name: Abhishek Thakur
headline: World's first 4x Kaggle Grandmaster · ML engineer

evidence.title: approachingalmost — Approaching (Almost) Any ML Problem
evidence.description: Open-source book and code covering practical machine learning end to end — cross-validation, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation. Thousands of stars; a reference for applied ML.

evidence.title: Kaggle profile — 4x Grandmaster (first ever)
evidence.description: Public Kaggle profile: world's first quadruple Grandmaster across competitions, notebooks, datasets, and discussion. Years of sustained competitive ML.

evidence.title: Public Kaggle notebooks
evidence.description: Public notebooks demonstrating reproducible modeling pipelines and competition write-ups.

evidence.title: Hugging Face — AutoTrain & open models
evidence.description: Hugging Face profile with open models and AutoTrain work — no-code/low-code model training tooling for the community.

evidence.title: YouTube — applied ML tutorials
evidence.description: Long-running channel teaching applied machine learning, competitions, and MLOps — consistent voluntary public output.
